title: androrchis × jailae
intro: Androrchis × jailae, a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Androrchis palustris and Neotinea ustulata, is a rare and unique plant. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Androrchis × jailae include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots in hot water or using it as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
